member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.PostErrorMessageParser
member.summary: Parses structured fields out of standardized messages.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.PostErrorMessageParser.InvalidWoRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
WO validation failed\\.\\s*WorkOrderGUID=(?<guid>[^,]+),\\s*WO Number=(?<wo>[^.]+)\\.\\s*Info=(?<info>.*?)(?:\\s+Errors:\\s*(?<errs>.*))?$
Options:
RegexOptions.Singleline | RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match the string "WO validation failed.".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match the string "WorkOrderGUID=".
○ "guid" capture group.
○ Match a character other than ',' atomically at least once.
○ Match ','.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match the string "WO Number=".
○ "wo" capture group.
○ Match a character other than '.' atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match the string "Info=".
○ "info" capture group.
○ Match any character lazily any number of times.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match the string "Errors:".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ "errs" capture group.
○ Match any character greedily any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.RunIdGenerator
member.summary: Generates run identifiers and correlation identifiers. Uses compact GUIDs.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.StatusChangeService
member.summary: Provides status change service behavior.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.StatusChangeService.HandleAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.StatusChangeRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes handle async.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.SubProjectProvisioningService
member.summary: Orchestrates FSCM subproject creation for a single Work Order request. Performs request validation, delegates to FSCM client, and emits AIS logs for observability.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.SubProjectProvisioningService.Validate(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.SubProjectCreateRequest)
member.summary: Validates SubProjectCreateRequest using reusable endpoint validator and maps to SubProjectError.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.WoDeltaPayloadService
member.summary: Provides wo delta payload service behavior.
Provides wo delta payload service behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.WoDeltaPayloadService.Keys
member.summary: Provides keys behavior.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.WoDeltaPayloadService.ForceAllLinesInactive(System.Text.Json.Nodes.JsonNode)
member.summary: Mutates the parsed payload to make every line inactive (delta => full reversal). We stamp both 'statecode' (1) and 'IsActive' (false) to satisfy existing loose readers. For CancelToZero behavior, we also zero the quantity-bearing field so old-subproject customer change does not recreate positive item/expense/hour lines.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.WoDeltaPayloadService.CopyFirstNonEmptyLoose(System.Text.Json.Nodes.JsonObject,System.Text.Json.Nodes.JsonObject,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Copies the first non-empty candidate from src into dst[dstKey]. If dst already has dstKey but it's empty, it will be overwritten.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.WoDeltaPayloadService.TryDeriveHeaderDimensionDisplayValue(System.Text.Json.Nodes.JsonObject)
member.summary: Derive WO-level DimensionDisplayValue from the first available journal line, if header is missing.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.WoPayloadJson
member.summary: Shared JsonElement helpers for WO payload navigation. Kept centralized so journal policies and validation engine can reuse without duplicating parsing logic.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.WoPayloadValidationEngine
member.summary: Orchestrates FSCM custom validation for normalized WO payload JSON. Behavior: - Never drops the whole WO due to invalid lines (line filtering is handled by local rules and/or FSCM filteredPayloadJson) - Fail-closed on FSCM validation transport failure (returns 0 WorkOrdersAfter) - Returns counts derived from input vs filtered payload

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.FsaDeltaPayload.FsaDeltaPayloadJsonUtil
member.summary: Small JSON helper utilities used by the FSA delta payload full-fetch path. Kept in one place to avoid duplicating fragile JSON parsing logic.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.FsaDeltaPayload.FsaDeltaPayloadJsonUtil.TryFormattedOnly(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to read only the formatted value for a field (Dataverse OData formatted value annotation).

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.FsaDeltaPayload.FsaDeltaPayloadJsonUtil.ParseGuidLoose(System.String)
member.summary: Parse of a GUID that might be wrapped like "{guid}" or contain other noise.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.DeltaComparer
member.summary: Provides delta comparer behavior.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.DeltaComparer.ExtractWoKeys(System.Text.Json.JsonDocument)
member.summary: Executes extract wo keys.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.DeltaCompareResult
member.summary: Carries delta compare result data.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.DeltaCompareResult.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Carries delta compare result data.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.DeltaPayloadBuilder.BuildWoListPayload(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.FsaDeltaSnapshot},System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Existing use-case contract: build outbound payload JSON as string.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.DeltaPayloadBuilder.Build``1(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Generic to avoid a compile-time dependency on a specific snapshot type name. Caller can pass IReadOnlyList<AnySnapshotType> and this will reflect required properties.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.DeltaPayloadBuilder.ResolveJournalActionSuffixForTriggeredBy(System.String)
member.summary: Resolve the journal action suffix used in JournalDescription based on trigger source. This is intentionally tolerant of casing and minor variants (e.g., AdhocBulk vs AdHocBulk).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.InvoiceAttributes.InvoiceAttributeDeltaBuilder
member.summary:
Compares FS attribute values against FSCM current values (both in memory) and returns delta updates. FS is always system-of-record: if values differ, FS value is sent to FSCM.
NOTE (case-insensitive schema matching): - FS may send schema keys like "rpc_wellname" - FSCM FieldFXSchemaName may be "rpc_Wellname" This builder normalizes both sides when mapping keys and when reading the FSCM snapshot, so camel-case differences do not prevent updates.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.InvoiceAttributes.RuntimeInvoiceAttributeMapper
member.summary: Generates runtime mapping between FS attribute keys and FSCM attribute names. Mapping is generated during execution using FSCM definitions ("attribute table") stored in memory.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.JournalPolicies.IJournalTypePolicy
member.summary: Journal-type specific behavior (section key + local validations). Intended to eliminate journal-type switches and keep the validation engine open for extension.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.JournalPolicies.IJournalTypePolicy.SectionKey
member.summary: Section key used in the payload for this journal type (e.g., WOItemLines).

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.JournalPolicies.IJournalTypePolicy.ValidateLocalLine(System.Guid,System.String,System.Guid,System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Collections.Generic.List{Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.WoPayloadValidationFailure})
member.summary: Applies local (in-process) validations for a single journal line. Implementations should add failures to only.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.JournalPolicies.IJournalTypePolicyResolver
member.summary: Resolves the configured for a given . Exposed to allow other layers (e.g., Infrastructure) to reuse the same journal metadata (section keys), avoiding journal-type switches.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.JournalPolicies.JournalTypePolicyBase
member.summary: Base journal policy with shared validations (quantity required for all).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.JournalPolicies.JournalTypePolicyResolver.DefaultJournalTypePolicy
member.summary: Safe fallback policy used when no policy is registered for a journal type. Ensures SectionKey is valid so JSON building cannot crash.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.ErrorEmailComposer
member.summary: Composes an HTML email body for orchestration failures. Adds a clean "Invalid Work Orders (Validation Failures)" section by parsing the standardized error message produced by PostingHttpClient (Code = FSCM_VALIDATION_FAILED_WO).

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.ErrorEmailComposer.ComposeHtml(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.PostResult)
member.summary: Executes compose html.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.ErrorEmailComposer.BuildInvalidWoRows(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.PostError})
member.summary: Executes build invalid wo rows.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.ErrorEmailComposer.TrimForEmail(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Executes trim for email.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.ErrorEmailComposer.InvalidWoRow
member.summary: Carries invalid wo row data.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.ErrorEmailComposer.InvalidWoRow.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Carries invalid wo row data.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.WoPayloadValidationPipeline.FscmReferenceValidator
member.summary: Optional FSCM-backed reference validation (custom endpoint) that can mark lines/WO as retryable/invalid.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.WoPayloadValidationPipeline.WoLocalValidator
member.summary: Performs local (AIS-side) validation and filtering without FSCM calls.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.WoPayloadValidationPipeline.WoPayloadJsonHelpers
member.summary: Small JSON helpers for WO payload validation. Kept separate so mappers/validators don't re-implement parsing logic.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.WoPayloadValidationPipeline.WoPayloadJsonHelpers.TryParseFscmOrIsoDate(System.String,System.DateTime@)
member.summary: Parses TransactionDate / rpc_OperationsDate that may be either: - FSCM style: /Date(1767052800000)/ - ISO-8601: 2026-01-31 or 2026-01-31T00:00:00Z

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Services.WoPayloadValidationRules.WoLocalValidationRule
member.summary: Local (AIS-side) payload validation rule executed before calling FSCM endpoints. Bridges async rule pipeline (IWoPayloadRule) to sync validator (IWoLocalValidator).

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.UseCases.FsaDeltaPayload.FsaDeltaPayloadUseCase.BuildFullFetchAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.GetFsaDeltaPayloadInputDto,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.FsaDeltaPayloadRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes build full fetch async.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.UseCases.FsaDeltaPayload.FsaDeltaPayloadUseCase.CollectLookupIds(System.Text.Json.JsonDocument,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.Guid},System.String[])
member.summary: Executes collect lookup ids.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.UseCases.FsaDeltaPayload.IFsaDeltaPayloadUseCase.BuildSingleWorkOrderAnyStatusAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.GetFsaDeltaPayloadInputDto,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.FsaDeltaPayloadRunOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Builds a WO payload for a single work order GUID even if it is not in the OPEN set. Intended for job-operation flows (e.g., Cancel) where the WO may already be closed/cancelled in FSA.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.AisLoggerPayloadExtensions
member.summary: Production-safe helpers for logging large JSON payloads into App Insights traces. - Logs sha256 + length always - Logs a snippet (and optional chunks) when enabled

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.AisLoggerPayloadExtensions.Sha256Hex(System.String)
member.summary: Executes sha 256 hex.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.AisValidationPostErrorBuilder
member.summary: Provides ais validation post error builder behavior.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.AisValidationPostErrorBuilder.BuildConcisePostErrors(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.WoPayloadValidationFailure},System.Int32)
member.summary: Executes build concise post errors.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.JsonLooseKey
member.summary: Shared loose-key JSON helpers (ignore spaces/underscores/hyphens; case-insensitive). Extracted so both Core services and Infrastructure clients reuse identical behavior.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.JsonLooseKey.NormalizeKeyLoose(System.String)
member.summary: Executes normalize key loose.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.JsonLooseKey.TryGetNodeLoose(System.Text.Json.Nodes.JsonObject,System.String,System.Text.Json.Nodes.JsonNode@)
member.summary: Executes try get node loose.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.JsonLooseKey.TryGetStringLoose(System.Text.Json.Nodes.JsonObject,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Executes try get string loose.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.JsonLooseKey.TryGetPropertyLoose(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonElement@)
member.summary: Executes try get property loose.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.LogText
member.summary: Utility helpers for keeping log messages within reasonable size limits.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.LogText.TrimForLog(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Trims a string to a safe maximum length for logs (App Insights trace size guard).

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.LogText.NormalizeGuidString(System.String)
member.summary: Executes normalize guid string.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.WoPayloadJsonToolkit
member.summary: Shared JSON helper routines for the Work Order payload contract. Placed in Core so both infrastructure clients and core services can reuse identical behavior.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.WoPayloadJsonToolkit.NormalizeWoPayloadToWoListKey(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes the WO payload shape so that the root contains "_request" and "_request.WOList". This tolerates common contract variants (e.g., "request" vs "_request", "woList" vs "WOList").

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.WoPayloadJsonToolkit.DetectJournalTypesPresent(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Detects which journal sections are present in the payload by inspecting non-empty JournalLines arrays. Returns types in stable order (Item, Expense, Hour).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.ThrottledLog
member.summary: Throttled debug logging helper to make best-effort parsing/probing failures observable without spamming logs.

member.name: F:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.ThrottledLog.DefaultMaxOccurrences
member.summary: Default: log only the first 3 occurrences per key, per process.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Utilities.ThrottledTrace
member.summary: Throttled trace helper for static helpers that do not have an ILogger available.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.AisDiagnosticsOptions
member.summary: Provides ais diagnostics options behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.AisDiagnosticsOptionsAdapter
member.summary: Provides ais diagnostics options adapter behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.FsaDeltaPayloadRunOptions
member.summary: Minimal run-time options required by the delta payload build use case. Mapped from Infrastructure FsOptions at the Functions boundary.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.FscmCustomValidationOptions
member.summary: Options for calling the FSCM custom validation endpoint.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.FscmCustomValidationOptions.EndpointPath
member.summary: Relative endpoint path under the FSCM base URL. Example: "/api/services/AIS/Validate" or "/api/services/RpcAis/Validate"

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.FscmCustomValidationOptions.TimeoutSeconds
member.summary: HTTP timeout in seconds for the validation call.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.InvoiceAttributeMappingOptions
member.summary: Provides mapping from FSA (Dataverse) attribute logical names to FSCM invoice attribute names. Loaded once at the beginning of each execution (app configuration / environment variables).

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.InvoiceAttributeMappingOptions.FsToFscm
member.summary: Key: FSA attribute logical name (e.g., rpc_wellname) Value: FSCM invoice attribute name to use in the outbound payload.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.NotificationOptions
member.summary: Provides notification options behavior.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.NotificationOptions.GetRecipients
member.summary: Executes get recipients.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.NotificationOptions.GetInvalidPayloadRecipients
member.summary: Executes get invalid payload recipients.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.PayloadValidationOptions
member.summary: Controls AIS-side payload validation behavior.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.PayloadValidationOptions.DropWholeWorkOrderOnAnyInvalidLine
member.summary: If true (default), any invalid journal line causes the entire Work Order to be excluded from the postable payload for that journal type.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.PayloadValidationOptions.EnableFscmCustomEndpointValidation
member.summary: Enables calling the FSCM custom validation endpoint AFTER local AIS validation. This should be enabled when FSCM provides a dedicated validation API to validate the AIS payload contract.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.PayloadValidationOptions.FailClosedOnFscmCustomValidationError
member.summary: If true (default), failures calling the FSCM custom validation endpoint will fail-closed: AIS will stop the run (FailFast) rather than posting potentially invalid data. If false, remote validation call failures will be treated as retryable for the affected work orders.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.PayloadValidationOptions.RetryMaxAttempts
member.summary: Maximum attempts for retryable validation failures (per journal type) within one orchestration run.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.PayloadValidationOptions.RetryDelaysMinutes
member.summary: Retry delays in minutes for attempts 1..N (1-based). If there are fewer entries than attempts, the last delay value is reused.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.ProcessingMode
member.summary: Defines processing mode values.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Options.ProcessingOptions
member.summary: Provides processing options behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IAisDiagnosticsOptions
member.summary: Defines i ais diagnostics options behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IAisLogger
member.summary: Defines i ais logger behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IEmailSender
member.summary: Defines i email sender behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFsaDeltaPayloadEnricher
member.summary: Enriches outbound delta payload JSON with FS-only fields (company/subproject, currency/resource/warehouse/site/lineNum/projectCategory).

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFsaDeltaPayloadEnricher.InjectWorkOrderHeaderFieldsIntoPayload(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.Guid,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.WoHeaderMappingFields})
member.summary: Injects mapping-only Work Order header fields fetched from Dataverse into WOList entries. Not used for delta calculation.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFsaDeltaPayloadEnricher.InjectJournalNamesIntoPayload(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.LegalEntityJournalNames})
member.summary: Adds JournalName at the journal header level (WOItemLines/WOExpLines/WOHourLines) based on legal entity settings in FSCM.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFsaDeltaPayloadEnricher.StampJournalDescriptionsIntoPayload(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Recomputes and stamps JournalDescription/JournalLineDescription using the final header values (WorkOrderID + SubProjectId) after all enrichment has completed. Action must be one of Post/Reverse/Recreate/Cancel.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFsaLineFetcher
member.summary: Defines i fsa line fetcher behavior.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFsaLineFetcher.GetWorkOrderIdsWithProductsAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lightweight presence query: returns WorkOrderIds that have at least one product line. This must not fetch full product lines.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFsaLineFetcher.GetWorkOrderIdsWithServicesAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lightweight presence query: returns WorkOrderIds that have at least one service line. This must not fetch full service lines.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFsaProductLineMapper.Map(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Guid,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.Guid,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.Guid,System.String})
member.summary: Maps a Dataverse Work Order Product row into a . Returns the mapped line and a flag indicating whether it should be treated as Inventory.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFsaServiceLineMapper.Map(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Maps a Dataverse Work Order Service row into a .

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmAccountingPeriodClient
member.summary: Defines i fscm accounting period client behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmCustomValidationClient
member.summary: Calls the FSCM custom validation endpoint for an AIS Work Order payload. This is a remote validation step that runs AFTER AIS local contract checks.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmCustomValidationClient.ValidateAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.JournalType,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates the provided AIS payload JSON for the given journal type and returns any failures. Implementations must throw only for programmer errors; transport failures should be represented as failures with or depending on policy.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmDocuAttachmentsClient
member.summary: Writes document attachment links into FSCM.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmGlobalAttributeMappingClient
member.summary: Provides an in-memory mapping between FSA attribute keys and FSCM attribute names. Source of truth is the FSCM OData entity set AttributeTypeGlobalAttributes (fields: Name, FSA).

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmGlobalAttributeMappingClient.GetFsToFscmNameMapAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a mapping dictionary where the key is the FSA attribute key (AttributeTypeGlobalAttributes.FSA) and the value is the FSCM attribute name (AttributeTypeGlobalAttributes.Name).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmInvoiceAttributesClient
member.summary: FSCM custom endpoints for invoice attributes. Used for runtime mapping (definitions), current value snapshot, and updates.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmJournalFetchClient
member.summary: Fetches journal lines from FSCM (OData) for a given Work Order. Used for delta calculation (group by WorkOrderLineId).

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmJournalFetchClient.FetchByWorkOrdersAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.JournalType,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Fetch journal lines from FSCM for a set of WorkOrder GUIDs (OR-filter batched) for a given JournalType.
Implementations MUST chunk the input IDs to avoid URL-length / OData parsing limits.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmLegalEntityIntegrationParametersClient
member.summary: Retrieves per-legal-entity integration parameters from FSCM.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmLegalEntityIntegrationParametersClient.GetJournalNamesAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches journal name identifiers for the given legal entity (DataAreaId).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmProjectStatusClient
member.summary: Custom endpoint to update FSCM project/subproject status/stage.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmProjectStatusClient.UpdateAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,System.String,System.String,System.Guid,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmProjectStatusClient.UpdateAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Legacy overload: some callers historically used a GUID SubProjectId. Preserved for backward compatibility.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmProjectStatusClient.UpdateAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Legacy overload: older callers used a textual status ("Posted", "Cancelled", ...). Preserved for backward compatibility.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmReleasedDistinctProductsClient
member.summary: Fetches project category identifiers from FSCM CDSReleasedDistinctProducts for a set of ItemNumbers. This is the ONLY source of ProjCategoryId/RPCProjCategoryId (Dataverse enrichment is intentionally not used).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.ReleasedDistinctProductCategory
member.summary: FSCM category ids for a released distinct product.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.ReleasedDistinctProductCategory.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: FSCM category ids for a released distinct product.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmSubProjectClient
member.summary: Defines i fscm sub project client behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFscmWoPayloadValidationClient
member.summary: Calls FSCM custom validation endpoint for WO payloads. Implemented in Infrastructure.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.RemoteWoPayloadValidationResult
member.summary: Parsed outcome of remote validation call. Kept in Core so Core can consume without referencing Infrastructure.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.RemoteWoPayloadValidationResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.WoPayloadValidationFailure},System.String,System.Int64,System.String)
member.summary: Parsed outcome of remote validation call. Kept in Core so Core can consume without referencing Infrastructure.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IFsWorkOrderAttachmentClient
member.summary: Reads work-order related document attachments from Field Service (Dataverse).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IInvalidPayloadNotifier
member.summary: Notifies about invalid work orders/lines found during AIS-side payload validation.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IPostingClient
member.summary: Client responsible for posting validated records to FSCM journals.
Existing contract: post staging references grouped by journal type.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IPostingClient.PostFromWoPayloadAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.JournalType,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: New contract: post using the raw WO payload JSON (as received from FSA), validating the same payload and filtering failed work orders before posting.

Post an already-validated WO payload batch (no validation call is performed in this method).
Use this for large payload scenarios where: - validate once (outside) and - post the payload in smaller batches to avoid timeouts and throttling.
The caller should pass any validation-related errors in so they can be carried through to the final .

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IPostingClient.ValidateOnceAndPostAllJournalTypesAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Validate the full WO payload ONCE (covers all journal types) and then post per journal type using the same validation response, filtering out only the failed journal type(s) per work order.
This is the recommended path for WO payloads that may contain Item/Expense/Hour journals together.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IPostResultHandler
member.summary: Extensibility point invoked after a posting attempt. Handlers can implement additional follow-up actions (notifications, compensations, retries, etc.) without modifying the posting client, maintaining Open/Closed Principle.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IPostResultHandler.CanHandle(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.PostResult)
member.summary: Returns true if this handler should run for the given post result.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IPostResultHandler.HandleAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.PostResult,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs the handler's post-processing action.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IRunIdGenerator
member.summary: Defines i run id generator behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.ISingleWorkOrderPostingClient
member.summary: Defines i single work order posting client behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.PostSingleWorkOrderResponse
member.summary: Carries post single work order response data.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.PostSingleWorkOrderResponse.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Carries post single work order response data.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IStatusChangeService
member.summary: Defines i status change service behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IWoDeltaPayloadService
member.summary: Defines i wo delta payload service behavior.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.WoDeltaPayloadBuildResult
member.summary: Carries wo delta payload build result data.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.WoDeltaPayloadBuildResult.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Carries wo delta payload build result data.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IWoDeltaPayloadServiceV2
member.summary: Delta builder with explicit options (baseline scoping + target-mode overrides). This is additive to .

member.name: F:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.WoDeltaTargetMode.Normal
member.summary: Normal delta semantics (current behavior).

member.name: F:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.WoDeltaTargetMode.CancelToZero
member.summary: Force the output payload to drive the target subproject to zero by treating all lines as inactive. Used for cancellation/reversal scenarios.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IWoPayloadRule
member.summary: Pluggable rule for Work Order payload validation. Rules should be deterministic and side-effect free (except logging).

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IWoPayloadRule.ApplyAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.WoPayloadRuleContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Apply the rule to the validation context. Rules may short-circuit by setting and .

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IWoPayloadValidationEngine
member.summary: Validates an AIS Work Order payload (AIS contract) prior to posting to FSCM. Implementations must be deterministic and side-effect free.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IWoPayloadValidationEngine.ValidateAndFilterAsync(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunContext,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.JournalType,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates a WO payload JSON and returns a result containing invalid details and a filtered payload JSON containing ONLY valid work orders.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.IWorkOrderStatusUpdateClient
member.summary: Client abstraction for sending a work-order status update payload to FSCM. Payload is forwarded unchanged (raw JSON).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Abstractions.WoPayloadRuleContext
member.summary: Mutable context shared across WO payload validation rules.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Application.Features.Delta.FsaDeltaPayload.Services.EnrichmentPipeline.DefaultFsaDeltaPayloadEnrichmentPipeline
member.summary: OCP-friendly enrichment pipeline: steps are discovered via DI.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Application.Features.Delta.FsaDeltaPayload.Services.EnrichmentPipeline.EnrichmentContext
member.summary: Immutable input bundle for outbound delta payload enrichment. Keeps the use case orchestration thin and enables OCP-friendly enrichment steps.
Immutable input bundle for outbound delta payload enrichment. Keeps the use case orchestration thin and enables OCP-friendly enrichment steps.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Application.Features.Delta.FsaDeltaPayload.Services.EnrichmentPipeline.IFsaDeltaPayloadEnrichmentPipeline
member.summary: Executes enrichment steps in a deterministic order.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Application.Features.Delta.FsaDeltaPayload.Services.EnrichmentPipeline.IFsaDeltaPayloadEnrichmentStep
member.summary: One responsibility: apply exactly one enrichment concern to the outbound payload.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Application.Features.Delta.FsaDeltaPayload.Services.EnrichmentPipeline.IFsaDeltaPayloadEnrichmentStep.Name
member.summary: Stable identifier for ordering/logging.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Application.Features.Delta.FsaDeltaPayload.Services.EnrichmentPipeline.IFsaDeltaPayloadEnrichmentStep.Order
member.summary: Execution order (ascending). Keep gaps for easy insertion.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidWoRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the InvalidWoRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidWoRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidWoRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidWoRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidWoRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidWoRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidWoRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidWoRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InvalidWoRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPop(System.Int32[],System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Pops 2 values from the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 1 value onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 2 values onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 3 values onto the backtracking stack.
